string-array.name: primarytriage
string-array.item: { \"queues\": [{ \"departmentid\": 67, \"officename\": \"儿科诊室3\", \"doctorname\": \"徐丽萍\", \"callno\": \"Y050\", \"waitno\": \"0009 朱思游游运 0010 陈思游 0018 黄培花 0014 李焕文 0011 陈文进 0016
